hero.headline: Harmony in Motion
hero.intro: A European seminar journey with Takafumi Nakayama Sensei – from Helsinki via Berlin, the Netherlands, Belgium and Luxembourg to the Trier/Konz region.

gallery.headline: Kobudo, Soft Blocking and learning together
gallery.intro: Real impressions from past seminars: bo work, partner training, shared practice and an international karate community.

softblock.title: Soft Blocking
softblock.text: Soft structure instead of raw force.

group.title: Group photo
group.text: Community across dojo and national borders.

sensei.headline: Takafumi Nakayama
sensei.text: Precision, calm and movement quality rooted in the Okinawan tradition.

training.headline: Karate-Do, Kobujutsu and Soft Blocking
training.text: The seminars connect fundamentals, partner work, timing, distance and body structure.

community.headline: Training together
community.text: A European gathering for serious practice and respectful exchange.

sponsor.headline: kanso
sponsor.text: A centre for body, mind and soul in Konz.

place.headline: Practical information
place.text: Travel details, times and local information will follow in the seminar descriptions.
